spells.name: Counterspell
spells.description: When you see a creature within range casting a spell with components, force it to make a Constitution save; on a failed save the spell fizzles and the action is wasted without expending the slot.

spells.name: Dispel Magic
spells.description: Choose a creature, object, or magical effect within range; ongoing spells of level 3 or lower end, and higher-level spells end on a successful spellcasting ability check.

spells.name: Fear
spells.description: Each creature in a 30-foot cone makes a Wisdom save or drops what it is holding and becomes frightened, dashing away from you by the safest route while it can still see you.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description: A bright streak erupts into a 20-foot-radius sphere; creatures in the area make a Dexterity save, taking 8d6 fire damage on a failure or half on a success.

spells.name: Fly
spells.description: Touch a willing creature to grant it a fly speed of 60 feet and the ability to hover until the spell ends.

spells.name: Haste
spells.description: Choose a willing creature to double its Speed, grant +2 AC, advantage on Dexterity saves, and an extra limited action each turn until the spell ends.

spells.name: Hypnotic Pattern
spells.description: Create a twisting pattern of colors in a 30-foot cube; creatures who can see it make Wisdom saves or become charmed, incapacitated, and speed 0 until damaged or shaken free.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.description: A 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide line of lightning blasts from you; creatures in the line make Dexterity saves against 8d6 lightning damage.

spells.name: Mass Healing Word
spells.description: Up to six creatures you can see within range regain hit points equal to 2d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

spells.name: Revivify
spells.description: Touch a creature that died within the last minute to restore it to life with 1 hit point, provided it did not die of old age and has the necessary body parts.

spells.name: Sending
spells.description: Send a short message of 25 words or fewer to a creature you know or that has been described by someone who has met it; the target can reply immediately.

spells.name: Spirit Guardians
spells.description: Protective spirits surround you in a 15-foot emanation, slowing enemies and forcing them to make Wisdom saves or take radiant or necrotic damage when they enter or end turns there.

spells.name: Stinking Cloud
spells.description: Create a heavily obscured 20-foot-radius sphere of nauseating gas; creatures starting their turns there make Constitution saves or are poisoned and unable to take actions or bonus actions that turn.
